body_preview: - Assessment self-test: `yyds state graph evidence <event_id>` returns "no graph evidence relations found" for runtime events. This was confirmed by the Phase A1 assessor on Day 137. - `build_graph_evidence_report` (commands_state.rs:6080) calls `query_graph_timeline` then filters through `graph_evidence_relation` (commands_state.rs:11578). The filter only a
expected_evidence: `state graph evidence` produces non-empty output Dashboard evidence claims gain new relation types visible in the "by relation" summary line Future sessions can use `state graph evidence` to trace failure provenance Implementation: In `src/commands_state.rs`, find the `graph_evidence_relation` function (around line 11578). Add the runtime relation types that
title: Expand graph evidence relation filter to include runtime event relations
